sourcesContent:
var contentEN = { "aboutme" : { "name" : "About me", "content" : <>

Greetings ♥, I'm Sumedh,
As a security analyst with 15+ months of experience in a Security Operation Center, I am passionate about Cyber Security and have a successful track record in Incident Response, Malware Analysis, Digital Forensics, and Network Penetration Testing.

EXPERIENCEs:

CryptoGen Nepal Pvt. Ltd.
◉ Role :
Associate Defensive Security Analyst


◉ Tenure : 13th February 2022 - 16th September 2022

I have developed personal projects in which I work with web apps, APIs, bots, and databases. I used concepts of functional programming, object-oriented programming, REST API, and image processing.

See the section about my programmer skills to see my projects and languages that I used, or contact me if you have an interest.

}, "skills" : { "name" : "Skills", "content" : <>

To work with image processing, bots, and automation I used Python. Here's one bot that I made, and a script where I use image processing to create a fractal.

To develop web apps and APIs I used JavaScript, ReactJs, and ExpressJS. Here's a library that I developed with this language.

Besides, I know and like many concepts of functional programming, where I learned from the Haskell language and javascript. See a package where I used the beauty of the Haskell type system.

See my github account to known more about these projects.

}, "contact" : { "name" : "Contact", "content" : <>

I'm open to work on private or open-source projects, or only talk with you, so feels free to send me a message, I will like to talk.

Here my contact info:

💻 My Github

👔 My Linkedin

📞 My Telegram

📨 raulrufino0@gmail.com

} } export default contentEN
